zh.lifeSummary: John Wood於大約1590年出生在英國英格蘭。他於大約1611年與Mrs John Wood在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1643年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德。他去世於1655年3月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Wood于大约1590年出生在英国英格兰。他于大约1611年与Mrs John Wood在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1643年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德。他去世于1655年3月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德波斯姆斯享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

en.lifeSummary: John Wood was born about 1590, in England, United Kingdom. He married Mrs John Wood about 1611, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Rhode Island, British Colonial America in 1643. He died on 17 March 1655, in Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: John Wood est né environ 1590, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Mrs John Wood environ 1611, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1643. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1655, à Portsmouth, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Woodは約1590年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。約1611年にイギリスでMrs John Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1643年にはイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドに住んでいた。彼は1655年3月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドポルトスモウスで66歳で死去した。

ko.Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: John Wood(은)는 대략 1590년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1611년 영국에서 Mrs John Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1643년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드에서 살았다. 그는 1655년 3월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Wood nasceu aproximadamente 1590, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Mrs John Wood aproximadamente 1611, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Rhode Island, British Colonial America em 1643. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1655, em Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Wood родился около 1590 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs John Wood около 1611 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1643 году. Он умер 17 марта 1655 г. в местности порцмоут, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет.
